questions: Grameen Bank er microfinance model ki?
answers: Microfinance provides small loans, savings accounts, and financial services to low-income individuals who don't have access to traditional banking, helping them start small businesses.
Microfinance holo gorib manush der choto choto loan deya ja tara business start korte pare. Bangladesh er Grameen Bank eta pioneer - Muhammad Yunus Nobel Prize peyechilen.
Microfinance works by providing small loans (often without collateral) to groups of borrowers who guarantee each other's loans, creating community accountability.
Benefits of microfinance include poverty reduction, women's empowerment, financial inclusion, small business development, and economic growth in underserved communities.
